purpose: Machine-readable identity/group/org/people/policy foundation contract for the platform-maturity ultragoal. This gate proves repo-local implementation, tests, route ownership, RLS/audit/passkey contracts, and no-false-live-claim evidence before downstream domain lanes depend on identity foundations.
nonClaimPolicy: G004 may prove local contract and regression coverage. Live rollout, production screenshot/trace closure, and Argo evidence remain G009; any route audit screenshotTraceEvidence that is still Pending must be treated as a blocker for rollout claims, not as live closure.

routePaths.requiredStory: desktop passkey, QR-to-mobile handoff, mobile passkey, stale OTP denial, and audit actor match
first login setup cannot bypass passkey enrollment or consent gates
pending setup users remain 설정 대기 and cannot be counted as active
platform admin can manage metadata without tenant-private data leakage
platform admin can manage tenant lifecycle under audit
platform admin can manage group registry, group accounts, and group slug/name
platform admin can view platform operations/audit without cross-tenant content exposure
platform onboarding uses audited tenant creation and deny paths
platform account settings support passkeys, OTP self-service, and scoped audit
settings index routes each role to the appropriate account, org, group, policy, or security surface
profile/security self-service supports passkeys and does not expose admin-only operations
security settings cover passkey list, QR handoff, and sensitive action step-up
admin can issue OTP/reset credentials without marking setup-pending users active
group admin can view consolidated group and switch each subsidiary scope
org admin manages regions/branches/org chart boundaries within authorized org
employee lifecycle covers onboard/offboard/terminate/transfer with signoffs and policy-bound sensitive fields
HR and payroll owners review registered employee, mobile or PC attendance, leave, approval, and legal-gated payroll readiness without exposing unauthorized sensitive fields
employee self-service records mobile or PC 출근, 외출/출장, 복귀, and 퇴근 punches with payroll material linkage
policy manager can create/edit/simulate custom PBAC/RBAC/ABAC policies, grant roles after preview/passkey, deny unauthorized grants, and audit actor match

backendContracts.contract: Group is not a tenant; cross-tenant group membership tables are owner-only and exposed only through SECURITY DEFINER resolvers that restore RLS.
requiredSnippets: A Group is NOT a tenant
REVOKE ALL ON groups, group_memberships, group_role_grants

backendContracts.contract: Platform can edit groups and create/revoke group accounts without direct runtime access to raw group authorization tables.
Custom PBAC/RBAC/ABAC policy substrate has versioned roles, permissions, conditions, assignments, preview receipts, RLS, and current org isolation.
Desktop QR login is a mobile-authenticates-PC handoff, not phone-only login; phone must prove existing passkey possession and no DELETE grant is exposed.
requiredSnippets: phone must prove possession of an existing passkey
GRANT SELECT, INSERT, UPDATE ON auth_device_login_handoffs TO mnt_rt

backendContracts.contract: Employee lifecycle events are append-only, RLS-isolated, and preserve Korean labor/payroll/privacy signoff evidence for onboard/offboard/terminate/transfer.
Core tenant data tables use RLS and current-org isolation for read/write paths.
Runtime role and immutable org-id triggers prevent cross-org mutation drift.
Rollout tables force RLS and audit events remain org-isolated.

frontendContracts.contract: User management distinguishes active vs setup-pending, supports OTP issue and passkey reset, and protects elevated role grants.
Policy Studio supports PBAC/RBAC/ABAC conditions, preview acknowledgement, passkey step-up, and audit event review.
Group admin can switch subsidiary scope and use group-wide module access without confusing group and tenant identity.
People operations expose employee lifecycle, transfers, signoffs, and status changes as first-class operations.
Organization management separates regions and branches with guarded create/edit/delete flows.
QR handoff UI clearly represents phone approval of desktop login and completion polling.
Group scope switcher lets authorized users move between group-all and subsidiary view-as contexts.

safetyAssertions: Group is not a tenant and group authorization tables are owner-only.
Platform support/admin manages metadata without tenant-private data leakage.
Desktop QR login path is desktop starts handoff -> mobile proves passkey -> desktop session completes.
Pending setup users are not shown as active until passkey setup is complete.
Sensitive role/policy changes require preview, passkey step-up, and immutable audit evidence.
Custom policy is modeled as PBAC/RBAC/ABAC role definitions, permissions, conditions, assignments, and scoped preview receipts.
Employee lifecycle handles onboarding, offboarding, termination, and intra-group transfer as append-only legal/payroll signoff events.
Unauthorized cross-org/group grants and scope switches are denied and visible in tests/gates.
Live screenshot/trace/Argo closure remains G009 unless captured by production browser evidence.
